verses.text: Topa aw, ka lungkham mahmahna panin nang tungah kong kiko hi
Topa aw, ka aw hong za in. Ka thumna awgingte hong ngai in
Topa aw, nangmah in mawhneite ciamteh lecin, Topa aw, kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam
Ahih hangin nangmah hong kizahtak theihna dingin nangmah in mawhna na maisak hi
Topa' hong huh ding lawpna tawh ka ngak a, ama thugen ka muang hi
Galvilte in zingsang hun ding a ngaklah sangin galvilte in phalvak hun ding a ngaklah sangin, Topa ka ngaklah zaw hi
Israel aw, Topa muang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' itna kip tawntungin, hong honkhia nuam tawntung hi
Mawhna a om khempeuh panin amah in Israel-te a honkhia ding hi.
